race.description: Racing Wa Provincial Championship Heat (C5) Hcp
race.comment: RAINLINE (3) led them up at Ascot last time out and ran away to score by 4.1L. Nottle went full throttle there, leading the field and giving nothing else a chance. Needs some luck from the barrier, but will be fitter for the fresh run and can repeat the dose. HISTORY WON'T CARE (1) disappointed last start when getting a long way back following a strong win at Belmont two starts back. Pike reunites now and he's never missed the placings when riding. Ticks plenty of boxes from the inside draw and can bounce back in a big way. FEARLESS TALK (8) is looking for the hat-trick after a 0.4L victory at Pinjarra 25 days ago. The form out of that race has been superb with 4 winners from 7 starters since. Has some early toe and can make her presence felt. FOREVER DREAMING (4) is better than she's shown her past couple and make some appeal coming back in trip off a freshen. CHERYL'S SHOUT (9) can improve on the fresh effort.
